item.title:
KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 9min As has been pointed out, I am a moron.
You would have 20 top 10s, six wins and also h
item.description:
Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 9min As has been pointed out, I am a moron.
You would have 20 top 10s, six wins and also have gone to three playoffs. Still pretty insane. Cita Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 7h If you beat Rory *and* Scottie at each of the last 20 majors, you would have finished.
1st (Masters) 1st (Open) 6th 1st (PGA) 1st (Masters) 6th 1st (U.S. Open) 7th 1st (Masters) 5th 1st (U.S. Open) 1st (PGA) 9th 2nd 1st (U.S. Open) 7th 1st (Masters) 7th 6th 7th
You would have 9 4 mil

item.title: chambleebrandel: Brandel Chamblee @chambleebrandel · 1h It should be Justin Leonard. Cita LKD @LukeKerrDineen · 10h U.S. Ryder Cup Team:
item.description:
Brandel Chamblee @chambleebrandel · 1h It should be Justin Leonard. Cita LKD @LukeKerrDineen · 10h U.S. Ryder Cup Team:
*still no idea who will be captain*
Meanwhile, European Ryder Cup team: 37 3 109 35 mil

item.title: JustinRayGolf: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 46min En respuesta a @chambleebrandel Can our fellow Texan flip the script on alternate sho
item.description: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 46min En respuesta a @chambleebrandel Can our fellow Texan flip the script on alternate shot results… like, say the U.S. Solheim Cup team has done the last two Cups? 4 1 mil

item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 57min Little early. But not wrong? 11 2 152 17 mil

item.title: ShaneRyanHere: Shane Ryan @ShaneRyanHere · 58min Members of the Corrupt Golf Media are currently holding an emergency meeting to discus
item.description: Shane Ryan @ShaneRyanHere · 58min Members of the Corrupt Golf Media are currently holding an emergency meeting to discuss the question of amnesty in re: the LIVbots of Twitter. There is some support for a Lincoln-like pardon, with full posting privileges, provided they take a PGA Tour loyalty oath, while a Mostrar más 12 5 117 9 mil
